name: tapauth
description: Get delegated access for AI agents via TapAuth — the trust layer between humans and AI agents. Use when your agent needs OAuth access to GitHub, Google Workspace, Gmail, Linear, or other providers, or when a user must supply a password or fixed API key through the manual secret flow. One API call creates an approval request; the user approves in browser; the agent gets the scoped token or encrypted user-entered secret. No TapAuth API key required. Do NOT use when the agent already has direct credentials.
